results.title: Ariana Grande issues 'unfortunate' update ahead of Eternal Sunshine upcoming shows
results.description: Ariana Grande's fans might feel disappointed as the singer and actress had to unfortunately reschedule three of her upcoming “Eternal Sunshine” shows.The Wicked star, who set to perform on July 12 at New York’s Barclays Center, announced on Monday that her show has now moved to...

results.title: Elle Season 1 Review: Pretty In Pink, Smarter Than Expected, Elle Finds Its Own Voice
results.description: Elle, the prequel to Legally Blonde, initially borrows so heavily from the original that it risks feeling like an exercise in brand management. Lexi Minetree shoulders an unenviable responsibility and emerges remarkably assured.
